notes: Compiler benchmark should capture scope, evidence, and safety constraints for a build mission.
inputText: Implement passkeys for sign-in without breaking the existing email-login fallback. Keep scope to apps/web and docs. I need test evidence and a rollback note. Do not change auth provider contracts or deploy anything.

dryRunOutput.title: Implement passkeys without breaking email login

acceptance: keep the code and docs changes inside apps/web and docs
attach test report evidence and a rollback note

notes: Compiler benchmark should show a discovery-style mission instead of flattening every request into a build mission.
inputText: Investigate why approval interrupts can strand executor tasks after a live turn stops mid-flight. Start with replay and runtime-codex evidence, keep it inside apps/control-plane, and do not merge or deploy anything yet.

dryRunOutput.title: Investigate approval interrupt stranding in the control plane
dryRunOutput.objective: Investigate why approval interrupts can strand executor tasks after a live turn stops mid-flight.
acceptance: identify replay evidence for the interrupted path
map the runtime-codex and approval modules involved
summarize likely stranding conditions and next steps
